GENERA SETUP GUIDE
← Main site Open Setup Assistant
Setup Guide

Your Genera setup, step by step

Four tailored journeys covering every combination of business type, team and collections. Pick your page, follow the steps, and go live with confidence.

SoloNo CollectionsDaycare · Grooming · Boarding · Mixed

Solo · No Collections

Just you, owners drop off. No routes, no rota.

Page 1 of 4
1

Make it yours

Branding, services, opening hours, documents and notifications.

  • Settings → BrandingAdd your logo & business details — Shown on your customer portal and every invoice.
  • Finance → ServicesCreate your services & prices — Every service type you offer — daycare, overnights, walks, grooms. Name and price is all you need.
  • Settings → CustomersSet operating times — booking limits, waitlists, owner terms and vaccination reminders.
  • Settings → DocumentsUpload documents — First-aid and insurance for owners; internal paperwork for staff.
  • Settings → NotificationsConfigure notifications — Choose which alerts go to the bell and which go to email.
2

Get paid

Set up invoicing before your first booking so nothing falls through the cracks.

  • Settings → PaymentsConnect Stripe or GoCardless — Unlocks automatic invoicing, Direct Debits and membership billing.
  • Settings → InvoicingOr: add your bank details — For manual invoicing — bank-transfer details print on every invoice PDF.
  • Settings → InvoicingConfigure invoice numbering & VAT — Set your prefix, payment terms and VAT rate before the first invoice goes out.
  • Finance → MembershipsOptional: create membership plans — Fixed monthly plans billed by Direct Debit. Requires Stripe or GoCardless.
3

Add customers & pets

Owner and pet records power everything — bookings, invoices, health alerts and vaccinations.

  • OwnersAdd your owners — Contact details, linked pets and communication preferences.
  • PetsAdd their pets — Breed, medical notes, vaccinations, behaviour flags and photos. Expiring vaccinations surface automatically.
  • Settings → CustomersSet vaccination reminder timing — Choose how far ahead owners and staff are notified.
4

Take bookings

The day-to-day heart of Genera.

  • Dashboard → Add BookingMake your first booking — Choose a pet, pick a service and add notes. Enable Recurring to repeat weekly.
  • Pets → Bookings tabUse quick-book on pet profiles — Sun = instant daycare day · Moon = instant overnight. No form needed.
  • BookingsHandle booking requests — Customer requests arrive in the Bookings list and Notification Centre.
5

Run the day-to-day

Once you're set up, these are the pages you'll live in.

  • Dashboard → DailyDaily view — Headcounts and stat cards per service — your morning run sheet.
  • Finance → InvoicesGenerate invoices — Pick a date range — charges group per owner. Stripe/GoCardless owners auto-collect.
  • Finance → DashboardFinance dashboard — Revenue, outstanding amounts and business health at a glance.
  • ReportsReports — Health alerts, vaccination coverage, late notices and emergency contacts.
  • Dashboard → NotificationsNotification Centre — Full inbox of all system alerts — requests, cancellations, health flags, payment events.
generasoftware.com/docs Step titles link directly to the help centre section generasoftware.com/setup
SoloWith CollectionsWalking · Daycare with pickups · Mixed

Solo · With Collections

Just you, but you collect and drop off. Routes included.

Page 2 of 4
1

Make it yours

Branding, services, collection windows, documents and notifications.

  • Settings → BrandingAdd your logo & business details — Shown on your customer portal and every invoice.
  • Finance → ServicesCreate your services & prices — Every service type you offer — daycare, overnights, walks, grooms. Name and price is all you need.
  • Settings → CustomersSet collection windows & operating times — Drop-off and collection times, booking limits, waitlists, owner terms and vaccination reminders.
  • Settings → DocumentsUpload documents — First-aid and insurance for owners; internal paperwork for staff.
  • Settings → NotificationsConfigure notifications — Choose which alerts go to the bell and which go to email.
2

Get paid

Set up invoicing before your first booking so nothing falls through the cracks.

  • Settings → PaymentsConnect Stripe or GoCardless — Unlocks automatic invoicing, Direct Debits and membership billing.
  • Settings → InvoicingOr: add your bank details — For manual invoicing — bank-transfer details print on every invoice PDF.
  • Settings → InvoicingConfigure invoice numbering & VAT — Set your prefix, payment terms and VAT rate before the first invoice goes out.
  • Finance → MembershipsOptional: create membership plans — Fixed monthly plans billed by Direct Debit. Requires Stripe or GoCardless.
3

Add customers & pets

Owner and pet records power everything — bookings, invoices, health alerts and vaccinations.

  • OwnersAdd your owners — Contact details, linked pets and communication preferences.
  • PetsAdd their pets — Breed, medical notes, vaccinations, behaviour flags and photos. Expiring vaccinations surface automatically.
  • Settings → CustomersSet vaccination reminder timing — Choose how far ahead owners and staff are notified.
4

Take bookings

The day-to-day heart of Genera.

  • Dashboard → Add BookingMake your first booking — Choose a pet, pick a service, set collect/drop-off toggles and add notes. Enable Recurring to repeat weekly.
  • Pets → Bookings tabUse quick-book on pet profiles — Sun = instant daycare day · Moon = instant overnight. No form needed.
  • BookingsHandle booking requests — Customer requests arrive in the Bookings list and Notification Centre.
5

Plan your routes

Build your standing routes once — each day adjusts automatically for who's booked in.

  • Routes → DefaultBuild default routes — Drag-and-drop stop order, colour-code routes, save as default.
  • Routes → DailyRun daily routes — Each day starts from your defaults, adjusted for bookings. Optimise stop order in one click.
  • Routes → TrackingLive tracking — Follow drivers through stops in real time on the map.
6

Run the day-to-day

Once you're set up, these are the pages you'll live in.

  • Dashboard → DailyDaily view — Headcounts and stat cards per service — your morning run sheet.
  • Finance → InvoicesGenerate invoices — Pick a date range — charges group per owner. Stripe/GoCardless owners auto-collect.
  • Finance → DashboardFinance dashboard — Revenue, outstanding amounts and business health at a glance.
  • ReportsReports — Health alerts, vaccination coverage, late notices and emergency contacts.
  • Dashboard → NotificationsNotification Centre — Full inbox of all system alerts — requests, cancellations, health flags, payment events.

Has TeamNo CollectionsDaycare · Grooming · Boarding · Mixed

Team · No Collections

You have staff. Owners drop off. Rotas and holidays added.

Page 3 of 4
1

Make it yours

Branding, services, opening hours, documents and notifications.

  • Settings → BrandingAdd your logo & business details — Shown on your customer portal and every invoice.
  • Finance → ServicesCreate your services & prices — Every service type you offer — daycare, overnights, walks, grooms. Name and price is all you need.
  • Settings → CustomersSet operating times — booking limits, waitlists, owner terms and vaccination reminders.
  • Settings → DocumentsUpload documents — First-aid and insurance for owners; internal paperwork for staff.
  • Settings → NotificationsConfigure notifications — Choose which alerts go to the bell and which go to email.
2

Get paid

Set up invoicing before your first booking so nothing falls through the cracks.

  • Settings → PaymentsConnect Stripe or GoCardless — Unlocks automatic invoicing, Direct Debits and membership billing.
  • Settings → InvoicingOr: add your bank details — For manual invoicing — bank-transfer details print on every invoice PDF.
  • Settings → InvoicingConfigure invoice numbering & VAT — Set your prefix, payment terms and VAT rate before the first invoice goes out.
  • Finance → MembershipsOptional: create membership plans — Fixed monthly plans billed by Direct Debit. Requires Stripe or GoCardless.
3

Add your team

Rotas, roles, salaries and holiday approvals.

  • Team → Manage StaffAdd team members — Each person gets an email invite. Set role, salary and holiday allowance.
  • Team → Staff ProfileSet working days — Mon–Sun toggles drive the rota calendar — no manual shift entry.
  • Team → Approve HolidaysLearn holiday approvals — Staff requests land in Approve Holidays; a second admin must approve your own.
4

Add customers & pets

Owner and pet records power everything — bookings, invoices, health alerts and vaccinations.

  • OwnersAdd your owners — Contact details, linked pets and communication preferences.
  • PetsAdd their pets — Breed, medical notes, vaccinations, behaviour flags and photos. Expiring vaccinations surface automatically.
  • Settings → CustomersSet vaccination reminder timing — Choose how far ahead owners and staff are notified.
5

Take bookings

The day-to-day heart of Genera.

  • Dashboard → Add BookingMake your first booking — Choose a pet, pick a service and add notes. Enable Recurring to repeat weekly.
  • Pets → Bookings tabUse quick-book on pet profiles — Sun = instant daycare day · Moon = instant overnight. No form needed.
  • BookingsHandle booking requests — Customer requests arrive in the Bookings list and Notification Centre.
6

Run the day-to-day

Once you're set up, these are the pages you'll live in.

  • Dashboard → DailyDaily view — Headcounts and stat cards per service — your morning run sheet.
  • Finance → InvoicesGenerate invoices — Pick a date range — charges group per owner. Stripe/GoCardless owners auto-collect.
  • Finance → DashboardFinance dashboard — Revenue, outstanding amounts, payroll and business health at a glance.
  • ReportsReports — Health alerts, vaccination coverage, late notices and emergency contacts.
  • Dashboard → NotificationsNotification Centre — Full inbox of all system alerts — requests, cancellations, health flags, payment events.

Rotas, roles, salaries and holiday approvals. Assign Driver role to anyone doing pickups.

  • Team → Approve HolidaysLearn holiday approvals — Staff requests land in Approve Holidays; a second admin must approve your own.

  • Routes → TrackingLive tracking — Follow drivers through stops in real time on the map.

Run the day-to-day

Once you're set up, these are the pages you'll live in.

  • Dashboard → DailyDaily view — Headcounts and stat cards per service — your morning run sheet.
  • Finance → InvoicesGenerate invoices — Pick a date range — charges group per owner. Stripe/GoCardless owners auto-collect.
  • Finance → DashboardFinance dashboard — Revenue, outstanding amounts, payroll and business health at a glance.

For the interactive setup assistant visit generasoftware.com/setup
